mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(wwi.实际入库日期, '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(wwi.实际入库日期, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(wwi.实际入库日期, '%Y-%m')
AS dateLabel, ROUND(SUM(wwi.实际收运数量), 3) AS inWeight, 0 AS outWeight FROM WAREHOUSING_WASTE_ITEM wwi INNER JOIN WAREHOUSING w ON w.入库单编号 = wwi.入库单编号 WHERE wwi.实际收运数量 IS NOT NULL AND wwi.实际收运数量 > 0 AND wwi.实际入库日期 IS NOT NULL AND w.状态 != '已删除' AND DATE(wwi.实际入库日期) >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE(wwi.实际入库日期) <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY dateLabel ORDER BY dateLabel ASC
